title: pilosella cochlearis subsp. subauricula
intro: Pilosella cochlearis subsp. subauricula is a subspecies of the Pilosella cochlearis plant, commonly known as the auricled mouse-ear hawk's-beard. This perennial plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pilosella cochlearis subsp. subauricula include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Pilosella cochlearis subsp. subauricula can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural remedy enthusiasts.
